docs.text:
Slack | AI work platform and productivity tools
Skip to main content
Close navigation
Close navigation
All your people and AI agents working together.
Slack connects your team. Slackbot multiplies what they can do.
Get started
Find your subscription
Trusted by top teams
Ask Slackbot
Plan launches
Run projects
Chat with clients
Automate tasks
Ask Slackbot
Plan launches
Run projects
Chat with clients
Automate tasks
Reimagine what’s possible with AI and agents.
AI in Slack doesn’t make you think, it helps you do. It summarises and searches based on actual conversations, making every app and agent more helpful and contextually aware than ever.
Update deals just by asking Slackbot
NEW
Summarise a conversation you missed
Get fast answers with Claude
NEW
Turn on AI note-taking in huddles
Review code with GitHub Copilot
Look up customer data in Agentforce
What’s new in Slack
See all updates
Link may open in new tab
New feature
Partner Apps MCP
Connect your favourite tools directly to Slackbot to surface live data and rich interactive content right in your conversation.
Link may open in new tab
New feature
Slackbot MCP
Slackbot uses MCP to reach the tools that your team already runs on – Google, Atlassian, Box, Notion, DocuSign and more – so one conversation can pull from your entire stack.
Link may open in new tab
New feature
Slackbot Memory
Other AI remembers what you told it.
Link may open in new tab
New feature
Slackbot Voice Dictation
For the employee who never opened Slackbot because typing felt like one more thing, you can now just say it out loud.
Link may open in new tab
New feature
Slackbot Native Charts
Numbers buried in a message are easy to miss.
Link may open in new tab
Feature enhancement
Group DM naming
Users have wanted to name their Group DMs since they launched in 2015.
Link may open in new tab
Feature enhancement
Sidebar filter
Just start typing and your channel list narrows in real time.
Knowledge
People
Process
Platform
Knowledge
Give everyone instant context.
Get access to every file, decision and conversation, so you can build on past work instead of recreating it.
Meet Slackbot: Your personal agent for work.
Slackbot isn’t just any AI. It’s AI that knows you and your team. It coordinates work across your apps and agents so that one conversation can get work done.
Learn more about Slackbot
One search to rule them all.
AI-powered search puts your company’s entire memory at your fingertips.
Learn about AI-powered search
Bring CRM data to the conversation.
Customer insights now live alongside conversations, so deals keep moving forward.
Learn about Salesforce in Slack
97 mins
Average time that users can save weekly with AI in Slack
1
People
Let your people connect like people.
Slack’s conversational UI makes collaborating more approachable, whether you’re working with a colleague or an agent.
It all starts with a channel.
Channels are flexible, transparent spaces for working with your team, AI assistants and agents.
Learn about channels
When talking is easier than typing…
…hop on a huddle, our built-in video tool. With AI in Slack, your meeting notes take themselves.
Learn about huddles
Bring conversations out of the inbox.
Slack Connect lets you chat with clients and vendors in real time, directly from Slack. Email can’t compare.
Learn about Slack connect
‘Slack has been essential to our growth, our speed and our ability to stay aligned as we scale.’
Kate Jenson, 
Head of Americas, Anthropic
Process
Manage all your work from one place.
Automate daily stand-up meetings, project updates and approvals so your team can focus on growth instead of guesswork.
Anyone can automate in Slack.
By click or by code, Slack makes it easy for anyone to build time-saving automations of their own.
Learn about workflows
Manage projects and tasks.
Track. Approve. Mark as complete. All without leaving the conversation.
Learn about lists
A simpler way to get started.
Project manager’s block? Beginning a brief? There’s a template for that.
See all templates
35%
increase in time saved due to automations for Slack users
2
Platform
Secure. Scaleable. Silo-free.
Our flexible, open platform is purpose-built for bringing the best agents and AI to every business, and can be tailored to fit however your teams work best.
From Atlassian to Zoom.
Google Drive. ChatGPT. Vercel. Box. Asana. Workday. You name it, it works in Slack.
See all integrations
Customise Slack to fit your needs.
Our platform is flexible so that you can build solutions specific to your business.
Learn about dev tools
Work without worry.
If it’s shared in Slack, it’s safe. Our security programme protects your data at every layer.
Learn about security
‘Work starts in conversation. That’s why we see Slack as the natural place to build our agents.’
Guillermo Rauch, 
CEO, Vercel
The most innovative companies run their business in Slack.
Slackbot helps MrBeast to create viral videos.
Slack helps Box bring agents to every employee
Caraway brings all the right ingredients together In Slack
Slack helps Rivian to do business in the fast lane

Based on an internal analysis during the pilot of AI in Slack features (channel recaps, thread summaries and AI search answers).

3

composio_raw.name: Slack
composio_raw.description: Slack is a channel-based messaging platform. With Slack, people can work together more effectively, connect all their software tools and services, and find the information they need to do their best work - all within a secure, enterprise-grade environment.

llm_raw.description: Slack is a cloud-based collaboration hub that connects people, information, and tools through channels and messaging.
llm_raw.notes: Relied heavily on prior knowledge of api.slack.com for Slack's REST API architecture and token structure. Page mentions new native Slackbot MCP integrations.
